docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-16-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHERFOUNI, YASSINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHERFOUNI, YASSINE AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,900.00 FILED BY CHERFOUNI, YASSINE AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-24-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-16-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-16-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF YASSINE CHEROUNI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LYFT INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JEANNIE LIEU PARALEGAL. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO CUSTODIAN LYFT
